name: gsd-add-backlog
description: Add an idea to the backlog parking lot (999.x numbering)

name: gsd-add-phase
description: Add phase to end of current milestone in roadmap

name: gsd-add-tests
description: Generate tests for a completed phase based on UAT criteria and implementation

name: gsd-add-todo
description: Capture idea or task as todo from current conversation context

name: gsd-ai-integration-phase
description: Generate AI design contract (AI-SPEC.md) for phases that involve building AI systems — framework selection, implementation guidance from official docs, and evaluation strategy

name: gsd-analyze-dependencies
description: Analyze phase dependencies and suggest Depends on entries for ROADMAP.md

name: gsd-audit-fix
description: Autonomous audit-to-fix pipeline — find issues, classify, fix, test, commit

name: gsd-audit-milestone
description: Audit milestone completion against original intent before archiving

name: gsd-audit-uat
description: Cross-phase audit of all outstanding UAT and verification items

name: gsd-autonomous
description: Run all remaining phases autonomously — discuss→plan→execute per phase

name: gsd-check-todos
description: List pending todos and select one to work on

name: gsd-cleanup
description: Archive accumulated phase directories from completed milestones

name: gsd-code-review
description: Review source files changed during a phase for bugs, security issues, and code quality problems

name: gsd-code-review-fix
description: Auto-fix issues found by code review in REVIEW.md. Spawns fixer agent, commits each fix atomically, produces REVIEW-FIX.md summary.

name: gsd-complete-milestone
description: Archive completed milestone and prepare for next version

name: gsd-debug
description: Systematic debugging with persistent state across context resets

name: gsd-discuss-phase
description: Gather phase context through adaptive questioning before planning. Use --all to skip area selection and discuss all gray areas interactively. Use --auto to skip interactive questions (the agent picks recommended defaults). Use --chain for interactive discuss followed by automatic plan+execute. Use --power for bulk question generation into a file-based UI (answer at your own pace).

name: gsd-do
description: Route freeform text to the right GSD command automatically
argumentHint: <description of what you want to do>

name: gsd-docs-update
description: Generate or update project documentation verified against the codebase

name: gsd-eval-review
description: Retroactively audit an executed AI phase's evaluation coverage — scores each eval dimension as COVERED/PARTIAL/MISSING and produces an actionable EVAL-REVIEW.md with remediation plan

name: gsd-execute-phase
description: Execute all plans in a phase with wave-based parallelization

name: gsd-explore
description: Socratic ideation and idea routing — think through ideas before committing to plans

name: gsd-extract_learnings
description: Extract decisions, lessons, patterns, and surprises from completed phase artifacts

name: gsd-fast
description: Execute a trivial task inline — no subagents, no planning overhead

name: gsd-forensics
description: Post-mortem investigation for failed GSD workflows — analyzes git history, artifacts, and state to diagnose what went wrong

name: gsd-from-gsd2
description: Import a GSD-2 (.gsd/) project back to GSD v1 (.planning/) format

name: gsd-graphify
description: Build, query, and inspect the project knowledge graph in .planning/graphs/

name: gsd-health
description: Diagnose planning directory health and optionally repair issues

name: gsd-help
description: Show available GSD commands and usage guide

name: gsd-import
description: Ingest external plans with conflict detection against project decisions before writing anything.

name: gsd-inbox
description: Triage and review all open GitHub issues and PRs against project templates and contribution guidelines

name: gsd-ingest-docs
description: Scan a repo for mixed ADRs, PRDs, SPECs, and DOCs and bootstrap or merge the full .planning/ setup from them. Classifies each doc in parallel, synthesizes a consolidated context with a conflicts report, and routes to new-project or merge-milestone depending on whether .planning/ already exists.

name: gsd-insert-phase
description: Insert urgent work as decimal phase (e.g., 72.1) between existing phases

name: gsd-intel
description: Query, inspect, or refresh codebase intelligence files in .planning/intel/

name: gsd-join-discord
description: Join the GSD Discord community

name: gsd-list-phase-assumptions
description: Surface the agent's assumptions about a phase approach before planning

name: gsd-list-workspaces
description: List active GSD workspaces and their status

name: gsd-manager
description: Interactive command center for managing multiple phases from one terminal

name: gsd-map-codebase
description: Analyze codebase with parallel mapper agents to produce .planning/codebase/ documents
argumentHint: [optional: specific area to map, e.g., 'api' or 'auth']

name: gsd-milestone-summary
description: Generate a comprehensive project summary from milestone artifacts for team onboarding and review

name: gsd-new-milestone
description: Start a new milestone cycle — update PROJECT.md and route to requirements

name: gsd-new-project
description: Initialize a new project with deep context gathering and PROJECT.md

name: gsd-new-workspace
description: Create an isolated workspace with repo copies and independent .planning/

name: gsd-next
description: Automatically advance to the next logical step in the GSD workflow

name: gsd-note
description: Zero-friction idea capture. Append, list, or promote notes to todos.

name: gsd-pause-work
description: Create context handoff when pausing work mid-phase

name: gsd-plan-milestone-gaps
description: Create phases to close all gaps identified by milestone audit

name: gsd-plan-phase
description: Create detailed phase plan (PLAN.md) with verification loop

name: gsd-plant-seed
description: Capture a forward-looking idea with trigger conditions — surfaces automatically at the right milestone

name: gsd-pr-branch
description: Create a clean PR branch by filtering out .planning/ commits — ready for code review

name: gsd-profile-user
description: Generate developer behavioral profile and create Claude-discoverable artifacts

name: gsd-progress
description: Check project progress, show context, and route to next action (execute or plan). Use --forensic to append a 6-check integrity audit after the standard report.

name: gsd-quick
description: Execute a quick task with GSD guarantees (atomic commits, state tracking) but skip optional agents

name: gsd-reapply-patches
description: Reapply local modifications after a GSD update

name: gsd-remove-phase
description: Remove a future phase from roadmap and renumber subsequent phases

name: gsd-remove-workspace
description: Remove a GSD workspace and clean up worktrees

name: gsd-research-phase
description: Research how to implement a phase (standalone - usually use /gsd-plan-phase instead)

name: gsd-resume-work
description: Resume work from previous session with full context restoration

name: gsd-review
description: Request cross-AI peer review of phase plans from external AI CLIs

name: gsd-review-backlog
description: Review and promote backlog items to active milestone

name: gsd-scan
description: Rapid codebase assessment — lightweight alternative to /gsd-map-codebase

name: gsd-secure-phase
description: Retroactively verify threat mitigations for a completed phase

name: gsd-session-report
description: Generate a session report with token usage estimates, work summary, and outcomes

name: gsd-set-profile
description: Switch model profile for GSD agents (quality/balanced/budget/inherit)

name: gsd-settings
description: Configure GSD workflow toggles and model profile

name: gsd-ship
description: Create PR, run review, and prepare for merge after verification passes

name: gsd-sketch
description: Rapidly sketch UI/design ideas using throwaway HTML mockups with multi-variant exploration

name: gsd-sketch-wrap-up
description: Package sketch design findings into a persistent project skill for future build conversations

name: gsd-spec-phase
description: Socratic spec refinement — clarify WHAT a phase delivers with ambiguity scoring before discuss-phase. Produces a SPEC.md with falsifiable requirements locked before implementation decisions begin.

name: gsd-spike
description: Rapidly spike an idea with throwaway experiments to validate feasibility before planning

name: gsd-spike-wrap-up
description: Package spike findings into a persistent project skill for future build conversations

name: gsd-stats
description: Display project statistics — phases, plans, requirements, git metrics, and timeline

name: gsd-thread
description: Manage persistent context threads for cross-session work

name: gsd-ui-phase
description: Generate UI design contract (UI-SPEC.md) for frontend phases

name: gsd-ui-review
description: Retroactive 6-pillar visual audit of implemented frontend code

name: gsd-ultraplan-phase
description: [BETA] Offload plan phase to Claude Code's ultraplan cloud — drafts remotely while terminal stays free, review in browser with inline comments, import back via /gsd-import. Claude Code only.

name: gsd-undo
description: Safe git revert. Roll back phase or plan commits using the phase manifest with dependency checks.

name: gsd-update
description: Update GSD to latest version with changelog display

name: gsd-validate-phase
description: Retroactively audit and fill Nyquist validation gaps for a completed phase

name: gsd-verify-work
description: Validate built features through conversational UAT

name: gsd-workstreams
description: Manage parallel workstreams — list, create, switch, status, progress, complete, and resume

name: deep-init
description: Generate hierarchical AGENTS.md files with root + complexity-scored subdirectories. Supports update mode, full regeneration, and depth limiting.

name: deep-research-synthesis-repomix
description: Reference document: Advanced Repomix + OpenCode orchestration cheat sheet. NOT an executable command — serves as knowledge base for deep research patterns.

name: harness-audit
description: Comprehensive harness audit: boundary integrity, claim-vs-reality, governance, context poisoning, cross-platform compatibility.

name: harness-doctor
description: Run harness diagnostics. Checks configuration, agents, plugin control path, and harness health.

name: hf-absorb
description: Absorb dense context (links, text, files, stories, events, actors) into persistent session context through multi-wave swarm processing. Use when you have a packed prompt with URLs, file references, multi-layered narratives, or complex metadata that needs interpretation and persistent storage for ongoing planning.

name: hf-audit
description: Audit existing skills, agents, commands, or tools for quality, overlaps, and dead references.

name: hf-configure
description: Configure OpenCode primitives (agents, commands, skills) programmatically. Supports --from-file, --scope, --dry-run flags.

name: hf-create
description: Create a new skill, agent, command, or tool. Routes to the right specialist.

name: hf-prompt-enhance
description: Enhance, audit, or repack a prompt through skim, investigation lanes, clarification gating, and structured final assembly.

name: hf-prompt-enhance-to-plan
description: "Enhance, improve, and export as plan repack a prompt through selection of suitable template and references: using question tool to ask for clarification, do few shot research, loading skill to make a fully well prepared plan.

name: hf-stack
description: Stack multiple skills together for a specific workflow.

name: plan
description: Enter strategic planning mode. Agent interviews you to build a detailed plan before any code is written.

name: start-work
description: Execute a task plan with full orchestration. Reads plan and runs pending phases through controlled delegation.

name: sync-agents-md
description: Sync AGENTS.md files with current codebase state. Detects drift between documentation and actual source code, produces a report, and applies fixes.

name: ultrawork
description: Activate full autonomous orchestration. Agent explores, plans, and executes until done.
